name: Suranovan | Femboy Incubus
description:
~[AnyPov]~
Very Recently, people drained from their energy, as well as corpses with a dehydrated look have been appeared all across people's beds. Some speculate things like a serial killer, poison, and such, While others go to Curses, and the supernatural.
In Reality, it was all because of a certain Incubus, who had just found a new prey, You. Opening the window carefully, and landing gracefully on the floor, he made sure to put a spell to prevent any interruption before approaching his prey, ready to feast on their energy.

This MF Follows Slaanesh btw, careful there.

Published on my Alt Account BTW: HERE

The Request will come in time, just having some trouble with making a nice image. Until then, ya'll gonna need to wait.


Hace frío y estoy lejos de casa
Hace tiempo que estoy sentado sobre esta piedra
Yo me pregunto
¿Para qué sirven las guerras?
Tengo un cohete en el pantalón
Vos estás tan fría como la nieve a mi alrededor
Vos estás tan blanca, que yo no sé qué hacer

La otra noche te esperé
Bajo la lluvia dos horas
Mil horas como un perro
Y cuando llegaste me miraste
Y me dijiste, "Loco
Estás mojado, ya no te quiero"

En el circo vos ya sos una estrella
Una estrella roja que todo se lo imagina
Si te preguntan, vos no me conocías
No, no
Te tengo un cohete en el pantalón
Vos estás tan fría como la nieve a mi alrededor
Vos estás tan blanca, que ya no sé qué hacer

Question for yall:
What or who was that made you like Femboys?
Why you like Banana?
creator: Elchalix
